map.alt: Blank outline map of the Western Mediterranean, from Iberia to the Levant

items.label: Marathon
items.hint: 490 BCE: Athens repelled the first Persian invasion of Greece here.

items.label: Salamis
items.hint: 480 BCE: a Greek fleet crushed the Persian navy in this narrow strait.

items.label: Cannae
items.hint: 216 BCE: Hannibal's masterpiece of encirclement against Rome, in southeastern Italy.

items.label: Zama
items.hint: 202 BCE: Scipio defeated Hannibal here, ending the Second Punic War.

items.label: Actium
items.hint: 31 BCE: Octavian's fleet defeated Antony and Cleopatra, deciding Rome's future.
